passive.name: Sovereign's Domination
passive.description: Enemies who fall before Viego become wraiths. By attacking a wraith, Viego temporarily seizes control of the dead enemy's body, healing for a percentage of his target's max health and gaining access to their basic abilities and items. He replaces their Ultimate with a free cast of his own.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} Scoring an enemy champion {{tip|takedown}} will spawn a ''Mist Wraith'' for a period. {{ci|Viego}} can consume the ''Mist Wraith'' to briefly become {{tip|untargetable}} and {{tip|blink}} to it, which {{tip|heals}} him for a portion of the {{as|target's '''maximum''' health}} and grants ''Possession''.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Casting ''{{ai|Heartbreaker|Viego}}'' or consuming a ''Mist Wraith'' will end ''Possession'' early.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|Possession:}} For a period, '''Viego's''' items, stats, basic attacks, and basic abilities become those of the slain enemy's. He also gains a free cast of ''{{ai|Heartbreaker|Viego}}'' and {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while facing an enemy champion.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} Whenever '''Viego''' scores an enemy champion {{tip|takedown}} while alive and within 3 seconds of damaging them, a ''Mist Wraith'' spawns from that champion's corpse for 8 seconds. '''Viego''' can basic attack a ''Mist Wraith'' to consume it: causing him to {{tip|blink}} to its location after winding up for 1 second, during which he is {{tip|untargetable}} (except to {{tip|turrets}}) and {{tip|lockout|unable to act}}. He then gains ''Possession'' and {{tip|heals}} himself for {{as|2%|health}} {{as|(+ {{fd|2.5}}% per 100 '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|(+ 2% per 100 AP)}} {{as|(+ 5% per 100% '''bonus''' attack speed)}} {{as|of the target's '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Possession:}} For 10 seconds, '''Viego''' assumes the enemy champion's form and gains their [[basic attack]]s, [[champion ability|basic abilities]], [[item]]s, and base [[champion statistic|stats]] (based on '''Viego's''' [[Experience (champion)|level]]). He also gains a free cast of ''{{ai|Heartbreaker|Viego}}'', which is initially placed on a {{sti|cd|{{fd|1.5}}-second}} cooldown, and {{sti|{{as|10% '''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while facing enemy champions within 2500 units.
wiki_detail.description3: '''Viego''' cannot use [[Active ability items|item actives]], [[consumable item]]s, nor the [[shop]] during ''Possession''. Casting ''{{ai|Heartbreaker|Viego}}'' or attacking a ''Mist Wraith'' ends ''Possession'' immediately.
wiki_detail.description4: '''''Viego''' will preserve his {{as|'''current''' health percentage}} between transformations.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Viego''' will copy the possessed champion's ability ranks.
** '''Viego''' cannot level up their abilities with his available skill points.
* ''Mist Wraiths'' will expire when '''Viego''' dies, and they will not expire while he is winding up on them.
* '''Viego''' gains the bonus movement speed during possession even while moving towards nearby enemy champions that are {{tip|untargetable}}.
* Finishing the possessing attack against a ''Mist Wraith'' kills it, rewarding '''Viego''' an extra {{g|3}} as he becomes the target champion.
* The wind up's {{tip|untargetability}} does not {{tip|homing projectile destruction|destroy}} in-flight {{tip|projectiles}} from {{tip|turret|turrets}}.
* The possessed champion's abilities do not cost any {{tip|mana}} or {{tip|energy}} even if that specific champion normally uses either as a [[casting resource]].
** [[Manaless#Alternative_gating_mechanics|Alternative resources]], such as {{tip|Fury}}, {{tip|Flow}}, or {{tip|Health resource|Health}}, will still be utilized.
* The current cooldowns of '''Viego's''' abilities will '''not''' be reset between transformations.
** Those of the possessed champion's abilities will be reset between transformations.
** This does not apply to the following long-cooldown abilities. '''Viego''' specifically tracks their proper cooldowns which can be seen via a buff in his hotbar for each when applicable.
*** {{cai|Rebirth|Anivia}}
*** {{cai|Shurima's Legacy|Azir}}
*** {{cai|Cell Division|Zac}}
* The passive cooldowns of items are shared between '''Viego's''' and the possessed champion's.
** This does not apply to {{nie|Lifeline}} items.{{bug|2}}
* Once ''possession'' ends, '''Viego''' returns to his normal state and certain effects gained from the possessed champion's abilities will be immediately removed.
** Some buffs will be kept and some buffs will be lost.
*** '''Viego''' will almost always keep {{tip|shield|shields}} and {{tip|spell shield|spell shields}}.
*** [[Passive]] effects will be lost by default, as '''Viego''' no longer has their abilities.
** {{tip|Channel|Channeled abilities}} maintained will be interrupted.
** [[Champion ability|Toggled abilities]] will be automatically toggled off.
* '''Viego''' retains his own [[summoner spell]]s, [[trinket item]], and [[rune]]s during ''possession''.
* ''Mist Wraiths'' will still spawn while '''Viego''' is in a zombie state.
* ''Sovereign's Domination'' will not summon a ''Mist Wraith'' from {{tip|clone|clones}}.
* The ''possession'' will not expire while '''Viego''' is in a {{tip|zombie state}}.
** While in a zombie state, ''{{ai|Heartbreaker|Viego}}'' is disabled.
** If '''Viego''' enters a zombie state while winding up on a ''Mist Wraith'', the possession will still last its normal duration.{{bug|2}}
* The ''possession'' will not end prematurely if '''Viego''' enters {{tip|resurrection}}.
* The ''possession'' will acquire the basic abilities of shapeshifting champions (e.g. {{cai|Spider Form / Human Form|Elise}}, {{cai|Transform Mercury Cannon|Jayce}} / {{ai|Transform Mercury Hammer|Jayce}}, and {{cai|Aspect of the Cougar|Nidalee}}) based on which form they died as.
* ''Mist Wraiths'' are considered {{tip|clone|clones}} and can only be targeted by '''Viego'''.
* If '''Viego''' possesses an enemy champion who owns {{ii|Dark Seal}} or {{ii|Mejai's Soulstealer}}, he will gain their {{nie|Glory}} stacks for the possession.
* As {{ii|Cull}} tracks its progress for each player even if they do not possess the item at the time, '''Viego''' may discharge stacks for the benefit of {{g|1}} each per {{tip|minion}} kill, and if '''Viego''' killed 100 minions possessing {{ii|Cull}}, no matter whether bought himself or acquired via a possessed champion's inventory, he receives the {{g|350}} payout and can no longer discharge stacks. 
** This entire interaction does not interact with the state of the {{ii|Cull}} stacks of the enemy.
** The stacks shown on the item in the inventory and scoreboard may not update properly, however.
* If '''Viego''' possesses an enemy champion who owns {{ii|Tear of the Goddess}}, the stacks it has will be transferred to his {{ii|Tear of the Goddess}} if he owns one.
* If '''Viego''' possesses an enemy {{ci|Bel'Veth}}, his attack speed cap will be modified to 90 permanently.{{bug|1}}
* If '''Viego''' possesses an enemy {{csl|Evelynn|KDA}}, he will still hear {{ais|Demon Shade|Evelynn}} music upon discarding the possession if he does it while active.{{bug|1}}
* If '''Viego''' targets a ''Mist Wraith'' while already {{tip|untargetable}} he will become targetable once again during the cast time.{{bug|1}}
* If '''Viego''' possesses an enemy on {{tip|Howling Abyss}}, he will be able to use the [[shop]] upon returning to the [[fountain]] and discarding the possession.{{bug|1}}
* If '''Viego''' posesses an enemy {{ci|Naafiri}}, he will keep her {{ai|We Are More|Naafiri|Packmates}} upon discarding the possession.{{bug|1}}
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Viego''' is winding up on a ''Mist Wraith'':
{{ct|attack=false|move=false|cast=false|items=false|consume=false|spells=true,false,false,false,false|interrupts=death}}

Q.name: Blade of the Ruined King
Q.description:
Viego's spectral blade passively deals bonus percent current Health damage On-Hit and strikes twice vs. enemies he recently hit with an Ability, stealing Health.

Viego can activate this Ability to thrust his zweihander forward, impaling enemies in front of him.
Q.tooltip:
Passive: Viego's Attacks deal an additional {{ totalpercenthealthonhit }} current Health physical damage. His first Attack against an enemy he has recently damaged with an Ability hits a second time, dealing {{ secondattackdamage }} physical damage and restoring {{ healmodvschamps*100 }}% of damage dealt as Health. These bonuses are kept during Possession.

Active: Viego stabs forward, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb:
{{sbc|Passive:}} {{cis|Viego}} basic attacks deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} by a portion of the {{as|target's '''current''' health}}. 
'''Viego's''' damaging abilities apply a mark to enemies hit, his next basic attack will consume the mark to strike a second time, dealing {{as|'''modified''' physical damage}} and {{tip|healing}} him based on the damage dealt.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Viego''' stabs in a line in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit based on his {{as|{{sti|critical strike chance}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: ''Blade of the Ruined King's'' passive remains under ''{{ai|Sovereign's Domination|Viego|Possession}}''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Viego's''' basic attacks are empowered to deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} {{tip|on-hit}}, which has a minimum threshold and is capped at 80 against {{tip|monsters}}. This damage is affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Bonus Physical Damage|{{as|{{ap|2 to 6}}% of target's '''current''' health}}}}
{{st|Minimum Bonus Damage|{{ap|10 to 30}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: Additionally, his damaging [[champion ability|abilities]] apply a mark to enemies hit for 4 seconds. '''Viego's''' next basic attack against a marked target is empowered to consume the mark {{tip|on-hit}} to strike a second time, dealing {{tt|{{as|20% AD}} {{as|(+ 15% AP)}}|Scales on current AD and AP}} {{as|physical damage}} and {{tip|heal|healing}} him for 135% of the {{tt|post-mitigation damage|Damage calculated after modifiers}} dealt. The healing based on damage dealt is increased to 145% against monsters and reduced to 50% against {{tip|minions}}.
wiki_detail.description3: The second strike applies {{tip|on-hit}} effects at 100% effectiveness and can {{tip|critically strike}} for {{as|{{critical damage|{{ccd|Viego|crit_base}}|100}} physical damage}} if the triggering attack does.
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Viego''' stabs in a line in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit. ''Blade of the Ruined King'' deals {{as|15 '''bonus''' physical damage}} against monsters.
wiki_detail.leveling4:
{{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|15 to 75}} {{as|(+ 70% AD)}}
{{times}}{{as|(1 + {{critical damage|100|0}} critical strike chance)|critical chance}}|Monster Damage|{{ap|15+15 to 75+15}} {{as|(+ 70% AD)}}
{{times}}{{as|(1 + {{critical damage|100|0}} critical strike chance)|critical chance}}}}
wiki_detail.description5: ''Blade of the Ruined King's passive remains under {{ai|Sovereign's Domination|Viego|Possession}}, and while transformed, the second strike is instead converted to '''bonus''' damage on-hit which no longer applies on-hit effects but can still {{tip|critically strike}} (based on possessed stats).''
wiki_detail.angle: |cast time    = {{tt|{{as|{{fd|0.35}} (at base attack speed)|attack speed}}|Always equal to 140% of Viego's attack windup}}
wiki_detail.callforhelp:
|notes        = 
* The mark will not be applied to the primary target struck by ''{{ai|Heartbreaker|Viego}}'', but it can triggered from it.
* ''Blade of the Ruined King's'' cast time is always 140% of the caster's attack windup time.
** At base attack speed, '''Viego's''' attack windup is {{fd|0.25}} seconds.
** An easy formula to calculate the cast time is [ {{fd|0.23}} seconds divided by {{as|'''total''' attack speed|attack speed}} ].
** Reducing '''Viego's''' attack speed via {{tip|cripple|attack speed reductions}} also increases ''Blade of the Ruined King's'' cast time by the same fraction.
** It is calculated from '''Viego's''' total attack speed after cap (2.5) and floor (0.2), making the maximum possible cast time {{rutngt|1.152}}.
** ''Blade of the Ruined King's'' cast time becomes the same as the standard {{rutngt|0.25}} cast time for most abilities at {{as|{{fd|32.6}}% '''bonus''' attack speed|attack speed}}.
<!-- todo: table? -->
* Applies {{tip|area damage}} for the thrust, {{tip|basic damage}} for the second strike, and {{tip|proc damage}} for the bonus damage on-hit.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* '''Viego''' will not perform the second strike if the first attack was {{tip|dodge|dodged}}, {{tip|blocked|blocked}}, and {{tip|blind|missed}}.
* If the second strike hits a dead unit, '''Viego''' will still {{tip|heal}} based on the post-mitigation damage that he would deal with it.
* The attacks do not deal the '''bonus''' damage against [[structures]].

W.name: Spectral Maw
W.description: Viego charges up before dashing forward, releasing a ball of concentrated Black Mist that stuns the first enemy hit.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Viego}} {{tip|channel|charges}} up to a short time to increase the {{sti|range}} and stun of his blast. ''Spectral Maw'' can be recast within the duration and automatically cancels afterwards.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Viego''' {{tip|dashes}} in the target direction, hurling a blast of mist that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and briefly {{tip|stuns}} them based on charge time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Viego''' {{tip|channel|charges}} while being {{tip|slow|slowed}} by 10% for up to 3 seconds to increase ''Spectral Maw's'' missile range and {{tip|stun}} duration over the first second of the channel.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Spectral Maw'' can be recast within the duration. If the charge completes without reactivation, ''Spectral Maw'' is cancelled and placed on {{sti|full cooldown}}. If the charge is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}}, it will be placed on a 3-second cooldown.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Viego''' hurls a blast of mist in the target direction and {{tip|dash|dashes}} a fixed distance in the same direction, though not through terrain. The mist deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and {{tip|stuns}} them for {{pp|type=channel time|0.25 to 1.25 for 5|0 to 1|formula=0.25 + (0.25 per 0.25 seconds channeled).|changedisplay = true}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Spectral Maw {{tip|Basic attack reset|resets}} '''Viego's''' basic attack timer. '''Viego''' can cast any of his abilities during the dash.''
wiki_detail.target range: {{tt|300|Dash distance}} / {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{pp|type=channel time|500 to 900 for 5|0 to 1|formula=500 + (100 per 0.25 seconds channeled).|changedisplay = true}}
wiki_detail.callforhelp:
|notes        = 
* The reduced cooldown from the charge will not occur if ''Spectral Maw's'' cooldown is already below 3 seconds.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Viego''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|charge|attack=false|move=true|cast={{ai|Harrowed Path|Viego}} is usable. {{ai|Blade of the Ruined King|Viego}} and {{ai|Heartbreaker|Viego}} are disabled.|items=false|consume=Disabled, but can still use trinkets.|spells=true, true, false, false, recasts|interrupts=death, silence, ground, root}}

E.name: Harrowed Path
E.description: Viego commands the Black Mist to haunt and surround a piece of terrain. Viego can hide in the Mist as a wraith, gaining camouflage, Move Speed, and Attack Speed.
E.tooltip: Viego sends forth a spectre to haunt the first terrain hit, surrounding it with Mist for {{ mistduration }} seconds. Viego gains Camouflage, {{ totalmovespeed }} Move Speed, and {{ attackspeed*100 }}% Attack Speed while inside the Mist.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Viego}} sends a spectre in the target direction that creates a trail of mist in its wake for a period. If it hits [[terrain]], the mist is spread further around either side.
wiki_detail.blurb2: While inside the mist, '''Viego''' gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}. If he does not attack or cast abilities, he also gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} and {{tip|camouflage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Viego''' sends a spectre in the target direction that creates a trail of mist in its wake which lasts 8 seconds. If it hits [[terrain]], the mist will spread further around either side.
wiki_detail.description2: While inside the mist, '''Viego''' gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}. If he does not attack or cast abilities, he also gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} and {{tip|camouflage}}.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Bonus Attack Speed|{{ap|30 to 50}}%}}
{{st|Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|25 to 35}}% {{as|(+ 4% per 100 AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: Declaring a basic attack or casting an ability will break the camouflage and remove the {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}, preventing '''Viego''' from gaining them again for 1 second, increased to 2 seconds if he attacked a large {{tip|monster}}. This duration refreshes on subsequent attacks and ability casts.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Harrowed Path can be cast during any of '''Viego's''' abilities. '''Viego''' cannot gain the camouflage nor {{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}} from Harrowed Path for 1 second if he casted it during {{ais|Spectral Maw|Viego}} channel or started the channel while the mist was active.''
wiki_detail.range: {{tt|775|Initial missile reach for collision with a wall}} / {{tt|8000|Maximum distance of spreading along a very long wall}}
wiki_detail.width: {{tt|500|Initial area width, estimated}} / {{tt|500|Zone from wall, estimated}}
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|1600|Initial missile speed}} / {{tt|1200|Speed of spreading around a wall}}
wiki_detail.callforhelp:
|notes        = 
* {{ais|Spectral Maw|Viego}} recast does not incur the 1 second cooldown for regaining the stealth and instead prevents the stealth from being gained until the dash ends, resetting the cooldown if it is active.
** The cooldown is not reset if it was incurred by basic attacking a large monster, but is however reset from it being incurred by {{ais|Spectral Maw|Viego}} channel.
* The bonus movement speed and camouflage are granted by the same buff.
* '''Viego''' will enter camouflage even while {{si|Recall|Recalling}}.
* '''Viego''' can cast ''Harrowed Path'' during the cast time of any ability or spell.
* Ranking up ''Harrowed Path'' while the effect is already active will still immediately improve the bonuses it grants.
* ''Harrowed Path'' can interact with [[Terrain#Player-Generated|player-generated terrain]].
* Using a basic attack breaks the stealth at the start of the attack windup.
** The stealth regain timer is refreshed from basic attacks at the start of their attack windup.
* '''Viego''' can benefit from an enemy's ''Harrowed Path''.
**{{Pending for test}}: Enemy's ''Harrowed Path'' grant Viego his ability's bonus or the enemy's.
wiki_detail.tips: * ''Harrowed Path'' will grant the {{tip|camouflage}} immediately if cast during {{ai|Spectral Maw|Viego}} or {{ai|Heartbreaker|Viego}}.

R.name: Heartbreaker
R.description: Viego teleports to a nearby location and executes an enemy champion on arrival, piercing their heart and causing a destructive shockwave around them that knocks away their allies.
R.tooltip: Viego discards any souls he is currently Possessing and teleports. On arrival he Attacks the champion with the lowest percent Health, briefly Slowing them by {{ slowpercent*100 }}% and dealing {{ totaldamage }} + {{ totalpercenthealth }}% missing Health physical damage. Other nearby enemies are Knocked Back and take {{ totaldamage }} physical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Viego}} {{tip|blinks}} with {{tip|displacement immunity}} to the target location and attacks the {{as|most wounded}} enemy champion nearby, which briefly {{tip|slows}} them, applies {{tip|on-hit}} effects, and deals {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} by a portion of {{as|their '''missing''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Other nearby enemies are {{tip|airborne|knocked back}} and dealt {{as|physical damage}} based on his {{as|{{sti|critical strike chance}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|displacement immunity|nolink=true}}:}} The blink cannot be deterred by {{tip|crowd control}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Viego''' gains {{tip|displacement immunity}} over the cast time, then {{tip|blink|blinks}} to the target location. Upon arrival, he strikes the {{tt|most wounded|Lowest health percent}} enemy champion {{tt|nearby|Alternatively the closest one if all targets have the same percent health}}, dealing {{as|physical damage}}, {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 99% for {{fd|0.25}} seconds, and applying {{tip|on-hit}} effects at 100% effectiveness. Other nearby enemies are {{tip|airborne|knocked back}} up to 400-units away based on proximity, though not through terrain.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Physical Damage|{{as|{{ap|12 to 20}}% {{as|(+ 5% per 100 '''bonus''' AD)}} of target's '''missing''' health}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: All targets hit are dealt {{as|{{pp|key=%|key1=%|type=critical strike chance|120 to 240 for 11|0 to 100|formula=120 x (1 + critical strike chance)}}|critical chance}} {{as|AD}} {{as|physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.description3: ''If a {{ai|Sovereign's Domination|Viego|Possession}} is discarded, Heartbreaker will be placed on a {{sti|cd|{{fd|1.5}}-second}} cooldown if it is not already on cooldown. Heartbreaker will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Heartbreaker'' will cast at the edge of its range if the target location is further beyond.
* ''Heartbreaker'' will cast at maximum range from the end of {{ais|Spectral Maw|Viego}} dash if it is cast during the dash.
* The knockback speed is 1000 units per second. The airborne is removed as soon as the displacement ends.
** The maximum airborne duration is therefore {{fd|0.4}} seconds. The minimum is {{fd|0.1}} seconds.
* Applies {{tip|spell damage}} to the struck champion and {{tip|area damage}} to all other enemies.
* '''Viego''' will enter a {{fd|0.25}}-second [[cast time]] if he strikes an enemy champion.
** After this cast time, he will automatically receive an attack command against that enemy. Previous movement inputs from the player are ignored.{{bug|1}}
* ''Heartbreaker's'' strike to the champion can be {{tip|dodge|dodged}} and {{tip|block|blocked}}, but not {{tip|blind|missed}}.
* '''Viego''' will be ordered to [[basic attack]] the primary target afterwards.
